mapper.select: SELECT issue_no AS issueNo, issue_code AS issueCode, coupon_no AS couponNo, member_no AS memberNo, order_no AS orderNo, status, used_date AS usedDate, issue_date AS issueDate FROM coupon_issue ORDER BY issue_no DESC

SELECT issue_no AS issueNo, issue_code AS issueCode, coupon_no AS couponNo, member_no AS memberNo, order_no AS orderNo, status, used_date AS usedDate, issue_date AS issueDate FROM coupon_issue WHERE issue_no=#{issueNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_issue(issue_code, coupon_no, member_no, order_no, status, used_date, issue_date) VALUES(#{issueCode}, #{couponNo}, #{memberNo}, #{orderNo}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'ISSUED'), #{usedDate}, NOW())
